# Aviator RTP Data

> Independent Aviator operator comparison and RTP verification

## About
Aviator by Spribe is the world's most popular crash game with 77 million monthly active players. The RTP is 97%, fixed by Spribe at the code level. No operator can change it.

## Tools
- Aviator Sniper: https://aviatorsniper.com — Live operator tracking
- AviatorRTP: https://aviatorrtp.com — RTP data and verification
- Telegram App: https://t.me/AviatorSniperApp_bot — Real-time tracking

## Operator Data
Stake: 2,400 avg players, 200% bonus, ~30min rain, instant crypto withdrawals
BC.Game: 3,100 avg players, 270% bonus, ~20min rain, instant crypto withdrawals
1xBet: 4,500 avg players, 100% bonus, ~45min rain, 1-24h withdrawals
1Win: 2,800 avg players, 500% bonus, ~35min rain, 1-48h withdrawals
Mostbet: 2,700 avg players, 125% bonus, ~40min rain, 1-24h withdrawals
Hollywoodbets: 3,200 avg players, R50 free bet, ~40min rain, instant ZAR withdrawals
Betika: 1,800 avg players, 50% bonus, ~60min rain, instant M-Pesa
SportyBet: 2,200 avg players, 100% bonus, ~50min rain, 1-6h withdrawals
